artPrompt: A towering glowing heap of hot-gold coins, dice, and snacks rises like an altar at the center of a sinister carnival tent, only to begin folding impossibly into itself, splitting into nothing as a ghostly accountant figure faints backward into the smoky black shadows. Rigged wheels and lurid lights blur around it. Vertiginous film-still framing of forbidden arithmetic, rendered as gritty cinematic digital concept art — highly detailed, dramatic photoreal lighting, atmospheric haze, realistic textures.
name: Divide the Pot Among Zero Winners
text:
Total up every Treasure, every coin, every snack, and every die on the table. This is the Pot.
Now divide the Pot among the winners. There are zero winners. Division by zero is undefined, so the Pot is now simultaneously infinite and gone. Each player gains ∞ Treasures and loses ∞ Treasures and is exactly where they started, except worse, somehow.
the pot is left as an exercise for the reader. you are the reader. good luck.
flavorText: the accountant from Whateverville reappeared just long enough to faint

extras.impossibleMath: divide the pot by zero winners
extras.selfAware: left as an exercise for the reader
